title: Public and Media Relations
description: A focused professional course in Public and Media Relations designed to build practical capability and confidence through expert-led sessions and real-world case application.
whoShouldAttend: This course is suitable for professionals, team leads, and managers seeking stronger skills in Public and Media Relations.
outcomes: Understand core principles and current practices in Public and Media Relations.
Apply practical frameworks to workplace challenges.
Develop an action plan for immediate implementation.

topics.title: Foundations and Core Concepts
bullets: Key terminology and principles in Public and Media Relations

topics.title: Tools, Methods, and Practice
bullets: Common pitfalls and how to avoid them
